items.name: 4th of July Cape
items.description:
American or not, there's no better way of celebrating 4th of July than buying this cape. Go above and beyond with your patriotism when you show off this cape, and show everyone the true meaning and memories of being an American, grilling hotdogs, barbecuing burgers with friends, grow a garden, and launching fireworks, just make sure to keep them out of the dog's mouth! (Works in R6 and R15) 

Modeled and Textured by: Celisnix

Note: Item will be made resellable after it sells out
